---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Cool Blog
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What pain points does it address?

**Current Behavior:**
What happens currently.

**Desired Behavior:**
What should happen with this feature.

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature be implemented?

- API changes needed?
- Database schema changes?
- UI/UX changes?
- Configuration changes?

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative approaches did you consider? Why did you choose this approach?

## Examples & Mockups

If applicable, add:
- Mockups or screenshots
- Code examples
- Links to similar features in other projects

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - blocking my adoption
- [ ] High - very important for my use case
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor enhancement

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.

## Implementation Help

Are you willing to:
- [ ] Implement this feature myself
- [ ] Help with implementation
- [ ] Review pull requests
- [ ] Test beta versions

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] I've explained the problem this solves
- [ ] I've considered alternative approaches
- [ ] I've provided examples or mockups (if applicable)
